name: National Pride (Tribal Competition)
logic_steps: Global Conflict: Show a world map where one country's color is being wiped out by a rival country's color.
The Shame Factor: Display a real-time (fake) leaderboard. 'Your Country is Rank #99. [Rival Country] is Rank #1'.
The Hero Call: A local language voiceover: 'Where are our [Nationality] brothers? We need you in Sector 7!'
The Turning Point: Show a few new players joining and the map color starting to push back.
regional_adaptation: Must use the specific flag and landmarks of the target market (e.g., Eiffel Tower for FR, Burj Khalifa for ME).
kpi_focus: High ROAS in GCC (Middle East), Brazil, and Vietnam. Best for SLG/MMO.
